patterns.label: Meeting-to-Loop Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 8 new occurrences confirmed (4 workflow executions + 4 Loop docs). Structure unchanged: Agenda→Notes→Decisions/Open Questions→Follow-up Tasks. MCS Analytics + Evaluations CAPECAT-PM Review doc cross-validates. SGI 89 CRITICAL. Chain head for meeting-workflow family (21.18h composite). Highest reliability pattern in corpus.

patterns.label: Azure DevOps Work-Item Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 30/week confirmed — saturated ceiling. Machine-parseable subjects (Task/Bug/Requirement/Feature/Epic #######). PM is subscriber, not assignee. Signal confidence 97: highest in corpus, longest unbroken streak. Decompose into 5 sub-classifiers for max yield. Shares triage infra with compliance-alert-classifier.

patterns.label: Parallel Eval Enablement Deck Creation (Team-Wide SGI)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 3 new parallel instances (TFM Agent Evals, CAPE_EVALs_Playbook_v5, eval convo deck). Meetings explicitly call for consolidation. EvalCon 2026-04-02 deadline (13 days) amplifying duplication urgency. Rising: temporal spike likely to resolve post-EvalCon unless standardization skill deployed.

patterns.label: Weekly Status Update Reporting (Multi-Format Duplication)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42 confirmed. Same progress restated across 4 formats: done/next/blockers email, bi-weekly newsletter, Cape Day/LT slides, leadership summary. Low occurrence count but guaranteed weekly cadence makes total impact high. Status-reporting family composite: 6.09h/wk.

patterns.label: Security & Compliance Alert Review (Purview/Office365)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 7/week confirmed. Alert types: File Blocked, Administrator elevated/revoked, Loop workspace attention. Deterministic classification: action-required vs informational vs self-resolving. High automation ceiling. Value capped at 72 due to sole-recipient nature.

patterns.label: External Partner & Customer Eval Sessions (50+ Domains)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 6 sessions, 13h, 50+ external domains (Accenture, HCL, EY, KPMG groups, Avanade, Cognizant). EDII 5.0+ sustained. Rising: partner demand increasing with EvalCon window. Est. 3.5h/cycle rebuild waste on prep materials. Cross-validates with eval-strategy-guidance pattern.

patterns.label: Eval Strategy Guidance & CLI Troubleshooting (Expert Bottleneck)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 15 inbound signals (10 strategy Q&A + 5 CLI troubleshooting). BSI 90 CRITICAL — raised from 87. PM is sole DRI. Camp AIR generated fresh batch of eval questions. EvalCon 2026-04-02 accelerating intake. Common Q types: eval case count, metrics (Compare Meaning, tool_call_accuracy, groundedness), CLI CSV format, feature flag availability.

patterns.label: Recurring Weekly Sync Meetings (Operating Rhythm)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 5 syncs confirmed — Evals Sync (Tues), Project Crucible v-Team (Mon), Manager Team Meeting (Mon), Solution Library Check-In (Mon), Golden Evals bi-weekly (Thu). All recurring, all extended through August. Operating rhythm lock-in confirmed.

patterns.label: Technical Artifact Distribution via Teams (Repos, ZIPs, Specs)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 10 sharing events (8 artifact distributions + 2 Loop workspace invites). PM-as-switchboard: GitHub repos, ZIP specs, YAML, markdown, Loop components distributed via Teams. Stable frequency. Loop invite dispatch absorbed into this pattern.

patterns.label: Strategic Leadership Email Thread Participation (CAPE/Evals)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 5 strategic events (3 CAPE/Evals leadership threads + 1 Project Crucible multi-reply + 1 URGENT Declarative Agent coordination). Thread summarization automatable (auto=62 ceiling). Positioning and escalation judgment requires PM. High-urgency escalation absorbed (URGENT Degree and URGENT DBS Declarative Agent).

patterns.label: Agent Architecture & MCP/Skills Scoping Discussions
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 6 events (5 MCP/skills/CLI scoping + 1 URGENT Declarative Agent grounding 170+ SharePoint sites). Rising: agentic initiatives (skill-creator, skills-detective, WorkIQ MCP, Copilot Studio) multiplying scoping demands. Architecture feasibility patterns accelerating.

patterns.label: Daily Personal Day-Prep Planning Page (Personal Ops Ritual)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 5 day-prep files confirmed. Pattern: [Mar 19] Help me prepare for my day — structured recurring artifact vs. blank-slate authoring. Composes from calendar, action items, email priorities. Sole-participant makes it maximally generalizable to any M365 user.

patterns.label: EvalCon Content Planning & CAPE Positioning Discussions
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 4 planning events. EvalCon deadline 2026-04-02 (13 days). Framing blockers, submission checklists, leadership alignment, deadline tracking. Rising: temporal urgency spike. Briefing templates and deadline trackers highly automatable.

patterns.label: VOC & Cross-Org Navigation Routing Assistance
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 4 routing events. PM routing FDEs to MCS Analytics and PG Eval teams. DRI table logic is deterministic and codifiable. Stable frequency. PM functioning as informal routing layer: field→PM→PG.

patterns.label: CAPE Camp AIR Immersive Training & Hackathon (Cascade Source)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: Camp AIR confirmed (15h Mon+Tue: Workflow, Mindset, CRM/Dataverse, M365 Copilot, Hackathon standups). CASCADE SOURCE: amplifies 6 downstream patterns at 0.7x. Quarterly cadence. 45h total across 3 observed cycles — largest single time sink in corpus.

patterns.label: Viva Engage & Community Digest Passive Consumption
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 5 digests confirmed (Daily/Weekly Digest, Copilot Tasks, Copilot Champs, SharePoint AI tips). Passive recipient. Low value score (35). Anti-Pattern candidate — summarization automatable but questionable ROI vs. simply unsubscribing.

patterns.label: Skill-Detector Spec Iterative Build Cycle (Meta-Pattern)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 6 events (5 ZIP spec builds + 1 dashboard HTML refresh). Meta-pattern: the skill-detector itself is a recurring work artifact. Weekly cadence now established. Rising: dashboard refresh confirms automated cycle is operational. Cross-source validated (document + teams).

patterns.label: Agent Eval Sets Template Maintenance (Living Excel Tracker)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 1 instance. Agent Eval Sets_Template.xlsx (shared Nov 2025–Jan 2026) continues as living tracker. Low frequency but high utility per event. Same family as eval-enablement-standardizer — potential merge candidate.

patterns.label: 1:1 Stakeholder Check-Ins (6/week, 3h45m)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: 6 1:1s confirmed, 3.75h total. Each requires context-loading from prior notes and open action items. Pre-1:1 briefing is high-value sub-skill within meeting-workflow family. Stable cadence — same 6 stakeholders each cycle.

patterns.label: Learning & Scaling Fridays (3h weekly skill-building block)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 42: Fridays 2:05-5:00 PM confirmed. 2.92h/session. Same small group (5 people). Low automation ceiling for the session itself; content curation, resource discovery, and pre-session briefing are automatable sub-tasks.

eval-enablement.sharedInfrastructure: Canonical eval knowledge base: metrics definitions, CLI reference, eval lifecycle model, partner-contextualized templates

meeting-workflow.sharedInfrastructure: Meeting context engine: calendar metadata, prior notes lookup, action item tracker, attendee briefing

event-coordination.sharedInfrastructure: Event lifecycle manager: agenda templates, artifact capture, debrief synthesis, follow-up routing

notification-management.sharedInfrastructure: Unified triage classifier: subject parsing, action-required detection, priority routing

status-reporting.sharedInfrastructure: Status data model: done/next/blockers with audience-specific rendering (LT, newsletter, email, slides)

knowledge-management.sharedInfrastructure: Org knowledge graph: DRI lookup, artifact registry, topic-to-contact mapping

architecture-advisory.sharedInfrastructure: Architecture knowledge base: MCP/SDK patterns, CLI vs UI tradeoffs, SharePoint grounding constraints, declarative agent specs

personal-ops.sharedInfrastructure: Personal context model: calendar, priority action items, email digest

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Generates structured Loop-compatible notes from any meeting context: Agenda → Meeting Notes → Decisions/Open Questions → Action Items (with owner + due date) → Follow-up email draft. Chain head for meeting-workflow family.
triggerExamples: Create Loop notes for today's Evals sync
Extract action items from Camp AIR standup transcript
Summarize Project Crucible weekly decisions
Set up 1:1 prep and notes page for stakeholder check-in
candidateSkills.valueProposition: SGI 89 CRITICAL. 7h recovered this cycle. Meeting-workflow family composite 21.18h/wk across 3 patterns. Cross-source VERIFIED (meeting + document). Chain head unlocking calendar-triage-advisor and one-on-one-prep-assistant.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Triages ADO work-item email notifications by type (Task/Bug/Requirement/Feature/Epic), urgency, and action-required status. PM is subscriber not assignee — most notifications are FYI. Shares classifier infrastructure with compliance-alert-classifier.
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO Evals notifications this week
Which ADO items need my direct action?
Filter noise from ADO Bug/Feature threads I'm subscribed to
Route task ###### to correct DRI
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Auto score 92 (highest). Signal confidence 97. 90 cumulative occurrences — SATURATED at 30/wk. Decompose into 5 sub-classifiers for maximum automation yield.

candidateSkills.name: eval-enablement-standardizer
candidateSkills.description: Generates canonical eval enablement decks and playbooks from a single template, audience-contextualized for SI partners, field engineers, or leadership. Eliminates 3+ parallel floating versions per cycle.
triggerExamples: Create eval intro deck for new SI partner (Accenture)
Consolidate the 5 floating eval deck versions
Generate CAPE evals playbook for EvalCon submission
Produce eval execution plan from CAPE_EVALs_Playbook template
candidateSkills.valueProposition: SGI 85. EvalCon 2026-04-02 (13 days) amplifies urgency. 3 new parallel instances this cycle. Eval-enablement family composite 49h/wk. Rising trend — deploy before EvalCon deadline.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies PM's eval expert knowledge into a tiered Q&A skill. Tier 1: deflects common strategy questions (eval case count, metric selection, eval lifecycle timing). Tier 2: structures complex design discussions. Tier 3: escalates to PM. Also handles CLI troubleshooting (CSV format, feature flags, tool_call_accuracy).
triggerExamples: How many eval cases are enough for a 3-intent agent?
What metrics should we use for a retrieval-augmented agent?
CSV import format not working — what's the correct schema?
When in the agent lifecycle should we run evals?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: BSI 90 CRITICAL — raised from 87. 45 cumulative occ. 15 inbound signals this cycle. PM is sole DRI for eval guidance. Unblocking this bottleneck unlocks team autonomy for 50+ external partner engagements.

candidateSkills.name: daily-briefing-composer
candidateSkills.description: Generates a pre-populated daily planning page by composing from calendar events, open action items, email priorities, and meeting prep notes. Replaces blank-slate daily planning with a structured briefing artifact.
triggerExamples: Help me prepare for my day
What's on my calendar and what needs my attention today?
Compile morning briefing from calendar, email, and open action items
Build today's planning page with Camp AIR agenda + open items
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 5x/week, 1.26h recovered this cycle. Sole-participant pattern = maximally generalizable to any M365 user. Composes outputs from ado-notification-router, calendar-triage-advisor, and meeting-notes-action-extractor.
